goal: Make AGENTS.md upsert section-aware (preserve user content), embed template via go:embed, update content to current v0.2+ workflow, write pointer stubs for CLAUDE.md / Cursor / Windsurf / Copilot, migrate legacy mainline-agents-md-version sections in place

summary.title: AGENTS.md section-aware upsert + IDE stubs + v0.2 workflow refresh
summary.what: Section-marker-based upsert preserves user content; IDE stubs (CLAUDE.md, .cursor/rules, .windsurfrules, .github/copilot-instructions.md) all use the same upsert; canonical templates moved to internal/engine/templates/ and embedded via go:embed; legacy '## Mainline' sections migrated in place. 7 unit tests cover preservation, idempotency, migration.
summary.why: Pre-fix writeAgentsMD silently skipped existing files (agent never saw mainline) and Rewire deleted+recreated (silent destruction of hand edits). Both broke for users adopting mainline on existing projects.
summary.user_goal: Make AGENTS.md adoption safe on any existing repo without destroying user content.

decisions.point: How to identify the mainline section
decisions.rationale: Invisible in rendered Markdown; easy regex; clear opt-out (delete the markers).

decisions.point: What other IDE files to write
decisions.rationale: Covers the four most common AI coding assistants; each gets a small stub pointing at AGENTS.md.

risks: Stubs are 4 separate files — if user wants to opt out they have to delete each. Documented in PR.
followups: Compare existing-block hash against template before overwriting; warn on hand-edited mainline sections.

architectural_claims: AGENTS.md upsert is section-aware via HTML markers; user content outside the block is byte-preserved.
Canonical agent template lives at internal/engine/templates/agents-md.md, embedded via go:embed.
IDE pointer stubs use the same upsert algorithm so all four files are equally safe to refresh.
behavioral_changes: mainline init --rewire no longer deletes AGENTS.md; uses upsert instead.
mainline init writes 4 IDE stubs alongside AGENTS.md.
migration_notes: Pre-v0.3 AGENTS.md files (legacy ## Mainline + version marker) are migrated in place on next rewire.
